metadata.title: Threshold
metadata.description: A chronological social platform for underground events, artists, clubs and collectives.

landing.body: Threshold is a chronological place for underground events, artists, clubs and collectives. Direct public pages stay open. An account unlocks the Feed and interactions.
landing.registrationOpen: Open registration — choose a supported city during setup

chronological.title: Chronological
chronological.body: Posts from accounts and official groups you choose, newest first. No ranking and no ads.

public.title: Public details
public.body: Event, artist and organization pages can be read without an account. Log in to interact.

private.title: Private means private
private.body: Guestlists are organizer-managed. Encrypted exact-location reveal is planned, not available in this release.

landing.footer: No real names required · no third-party trackers

metadata.registerDescription: Create a Threshold account. Registration is open.

authFlow.usernameHelp: 3–30 letters, numbers, periods, underscores or hyphens.
authFlow.passwordHelp: At least 12 characters with lowercase, uppercase, a digit and a symbol.

errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email or nickname and password.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait and try again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Authentication is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
errors.username: Use 3–30 letters, numbers, periods, underscores or hyphens.
errors.reservedUsername: That nickname is reserved. Choose another.
errors.password: Password must meet all security requirements.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.accountExists: An account with that email or nickname already exists.
errors.register: Could not create the account. Try again.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.sent: If an account exists for that address, check its inbox for a reset link.
reset.passwordHelp: At least 12 characters with lowercase, uppercase, a digit and a symbol.

policyErrors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.

reset.invalid: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
reset.network: Could not reach the network. Try again.
reset.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait and try again.
reset.unavailable: Password reset is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
reset.updatedBody: Your password was changed and all sessions were signed out. Log in with your new password.

verify.success: Your email is verified for account security and recovery.
verify.invalid: This verification link is missing or no longer valid. Request a new one from your account.
verify.service: Email verification is temporarily unavailable. Try again.
verify.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait and try again.

banner.body: Verify your email for account security and recovery.
banner.error: Could not send the verification email. Try again.

authServiceUnavailable.title: Account status unavailable
authServiceUnavailable.body: Threshold could not verify your session. Your account and cookies were left unchanged.
authServiceUnavailable.publicBanner: Account interactions are temporarily unavailable. Public details remain readable.

metadata.title: Set up your account
metadata.description: Choose your Threshold identity, city and scene preferences.

onboarding.title: Cross the threshold
onboarding.subtitle: Choose a city to enter the Feed

identity.body: Choose your public nickname. No real name is required. You can add an avatar later.
identity.hint: This becomes your display name. You can change it later in Settings.

city.body: Choose your city. A supported city is required for this release.

frequencies.body: Choose any scene tags that fit. This step is optional and can be changed later.

access.body: Threshold will join your account to the official group for the selected city.
access.hint: No artists, clubs or collectives are followed automatically.

done.body: Your city and optional scene preferences are ready to save.
done.hint: After the official city group is joined, you will continue to the Feed.

errors.profile: Your nickname could not be saved. Try again.
errors.save: Setup or the official city group could not be saved. Try again.
errors.network: Could not reach the network. Try again.

metadata.title: Privacy boundary
metadata.description: Current Threshold privacy and private-access limits.

privacy.title: Private access metadata is visible to the server.
privacy.intro: Guestlist access works in this release, but encrypted exact-location reveal does not. Threshold does not claim that exact secret addresses are protected by a feature that has not shipped.

points.one: Organizers and authorized staff can manage guestlists and door check-in.
points.two: The server processes access status, organizer actions, account identifiers and audit records.
points.three: Encrypted exact-location storage and reveal remain future security work.

server.label: Server-visible now
server.value: access status, organizer and DJ actions, account IDs and audit records

future.label: Future privacy work
future.value: client-side encryption, recipient keys and controlled location reveal

privacy.footer: Do not treat access metadata as end-to-end encrypted.

errors.notFound: This profile is no longer available.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
errors.network: Could not reach the network. Try again.

eventsCatalog.title: Events
eventsCatalog.subtitle: Upcoming / all supported cities / chronological
eventsCatalog.emptyBody: No published upcoming events match this catalog right now.
eventsCatalog.loadErrorBody: The event catalog could not be loaded.

metadata.title: Search
metadata.description: Search Threshold profiles, Pages, groups and events.

searchPage.title: Search
searchPage.subtitle: Profiles / Pages / groups / events
searchPage.noResultsBody: Nothing matched “{query}”. Try a name, @handle, event, city or genre.
searchPage.emptyBody: Find people, artists, clubs, collectives, groups and events using real published data.
searchPage.loadErrorBody: Search services could not be reached.

metadata.title: Notifications
metadata.description: Account, event and scene activity on Threshold.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Account and event activity stored in Threshold. Push and email delivery are not enabled.
notifications.loadError: Notifications could not be loaded. Try again.
notifications.readError: This notification could not be marked read.
notifications.readAllError: Notifications could not be marked read.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Official scene channels
groups.emptyBody: No official scene groups are available right now.

metadata.title: Group | Threshold
metadata.description: An official scene group on Threshold.

groupDetail.emptyJoined: Be the first to post in this group.
groupDetail.emptyNotJoined: Join this group to post and follow the conversation.
groupDetail.loadErrorBody: This group could not be loaded.

membership.error: Group membership could not be updated.

metadata.title: Settings
metadata.description: Manage your Threshold public identity, notifications and account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Public identity / notifications / account
settings.loadErrorBody: Your profile settings could not be loaded.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: How your public identity appears on posts, comments and your profile page.
profile.bioHint: Shown on your profile page. Plain text only.
profile.cityHint: Used for local events and official groups.

artist.title: Artist profile
artist.description: Public details shown on your artist profile.
artist.createDescription: Add a public artist role, location and links.
artist.intro: Use the same public nickname; no real name is required.
artist.roleHint: What you do in the scene.
artist.linksHint: SoundCloud, Bandcamp, RA… URLs must start with https://

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Choose which non-critical activity appears in your inbox.

mentions_enabled.title: Mentions
mentions_enabled.body: Notify when your profile or Page is mentioned.

engagement_enabled.title: Engagement
engagement_enabled.body: Notify about follows, comments, reactions and votes.

event_updates_enabled.title: Event updates
event_updates_enabled.body: Notify about updates from events you follow.

page_updates_enabled.title: Page and group updates
page_updates_enabled.body: Notify about updates from Pages and groups.

notifications.loadError: Preferences could not be loaded. Controls stay unavailable until the real settings load.

account.title: Account
account.deleteBody: Your public identity is anonymized and personal account data is removed where required. This cannot be undone.

metadata.title: Organizer Pages
metadata.description: Create and manage Threshold organizer Pages.

organizerPages.title: Organizer Pages
organizerPages.subtitle: Clubs / collectives / projects / festivals
organizerPages.empty: You do not manage any Pages.
organizerPages.loadError: Managed Pages could not be loaded.

savedPage.title: Saved
savedPage.subtitle: Personal saved items
savedPage.emptyBody: This release does not store saved posts or events.

metadata.title: Access
metadata.description: Your private event access on Threshold.

guestlistPage.title: Access
guestlistPage.subtitle: Private event access
guestlistPage.emptyBody: Organizer-added guestlist access and QR check-in are available on event pages. This release has no global access inbox, public request flow or encrypted exact-location reveal.

feed.title: Feed
feed.emptyBody: Follow clubs, DJs and collectives to build your chronological feed. Everything they publish lands here, newest first.
feed.suggestionGroups: Open Groups to join an official city channel

composer.title: + Post
composer.subtitle: Share text, images, and an optional event
composer.placeholder: Share something with the scene. Tag @people.
